brief: Design a small 5 V LED flicker circuit. Supply must stay within 4.75–5.25 V. The LED shall flicker at 10 Hz ±5% (9.5–10.5 Hz) in steady state. Include a current-limiting element to keep LED forward current ≤ 15 mA. Expose attributes for: supply voltage, target frequency, achieved frequency, LED present, current limiter present, oscillator present. Everything must be sourceable from Mouser. Keep the SysML minimal and compilable.
